experiment: AAAI Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct — folded_remote A_rightmul (OURS) vs plaintext_local, ALL fp32
precision: fp32 (--fold-dtype-override float32 on the GPU worker)

setup.OURS: TDX guest boundary + H800 folded GPU worker (single TEE session, A_rightmul, attested)

ifeval.scorer: official google instruction_following_eval (prior session; module not available locally to re-derive)

mt_bench.judge: claude-opus single-answer (NOT GPT-4; absolute not comparable to GPT-4 leaderboard)

ablation_bf16_vs_fp32_ifeval.finding: 16-bit folded-op rounding flips near-tie argmax -> degeneration loops + ~7pt artifact; fp32 removes it. Hard reproducible metric: degeneration 18 -> 0.

headline: Under matched fp32, OURS is at statistical parity with plaintext on all three datasets (IFEval +2.59pt, GSM8K +0.30pt, MT-Bench -0.08). The obfuscation protocol has no measurable utility cost; report as PARITY, not improvement.
